internal_projects.title: Operations Monitoring Dashboard
internal_projects.description: Developed a backend-driven monitoring solution for internal operational workflows in a financial-services environment. The system consolidated activity data, supported management reporting, and improved process visibility and reporting consistency for internal teams.
internal_projects.note: Internal enterprise project; live demo not publicly available.

internal_projects.title: Leave Operations Tracker
internal_projects.description: Built an internal workflow application for managing employee leave and time-off processes. The tool helped teams coordinate reminders, tasks, and status tracking across internal stakeholders, improving organization and reducing manual follow-ups.
internal_projects.note: Internal enterprise project; live demo not publicly available.

internal_projects.title: Process Analysis Dashboard
internal_projects.description: Developed a process analysis dashboard for internal operations workflows, focused on trend visibility, turnaround monitoring, and process improvement reporting. The solution helped teams identify inefficiencies at a high level, monitor recurring issues, and support data-driven improvement initiatives.
internal_projects.note: Internal enterprise project; live demo not publicly available.

internal_projects.title: Snowflake Quality Report Automation
internal_projects.description: Created an automated reporting solution that extracts data from Snowflake and generates structured quality reports in Excel. This reduced manual reporting effort, improved consistency, and helped teams monitor reporting quality and operational performance more efficiently.
internal_projects.note: Internal enterprise project; live demo not publicly available.

internal_projects.title: Onboarding Progress Tracker
internal_projects.description: Built an internal tracking and reporting solution for monitoring onboarding progress and management reporting. The system improved visibility into onboarding readiness and helped teams track training progress more effectively.
internal_projects.note: Internal enterprise project; live demo not publicly available.

internal_projects.title: Automated Ticket Routing and Workforce Dashboard
internal_projects.description: Designed and developed an automated ticket-routing and workforce management solution for internal teams. The platform included a real-time dashboard for monitoring workflow status, assignment visibility, and team availability, improving workload balancing, operational control, and day-to-day visibility.
internal_projects.note: Internal enterprise project; live demo not publicly available.

internal_projects.title: Location Mapping
internal_projects.description: Developed a location mapping solution designed to visualize and manage location-based operational data through a responsive web interface. The application supports structured data handling, mapping-related workflows, and backend integration for improved usability and operational reference.
internal_projects.note: Internal enterprise project; live demo not publicly available.

other_works.title: Invoice Generator
other_works.description: Developed a Python-based invoice generation tool that creates professional PDF invoices from Excel source data and supporting evidence images stored in a folder. The solution automates document generation, organizes supporting attachments, and helps reduce manual formatting work for invoice preparation.

other_works.title: My Portfolio
other_works.description: Built a personal portfolio website with a premium dark UI to showcase projects, skills, career background, and development work in a polished modern interface. The site was developed using Next.js and TypeScript, with content structured for maintainability and presentation quality. I handled the AWS setup and deployment for this project myself using AWS Amplify, and I connected it to a GitHub-based CI/CD workflow for automated updates. It also includes an OpenAI-powered chatbot that answers portfolio-related questions in a more interactive and personalized way, reflecting a practical blend of frontend development, hands-on cloud deployment, and AI-assisted user experience design.
